landing.heroSubtitle: The all-in-one AI studio for creators, writers, and developers.

bento.aiWritingDesc: Generate high-quality articles, marketing copy, and emails in seconds. Bypass AI detectors effortlessly.
bento.smartChatDesc: Chat with an advanced AI assistant that understands context and helps you brainstorm.
bento.imageGenDesc: Transform your ideas into stunning visuals with state-of-the-art DALL-E and Midjourney integrations.
bento.multilingualDesc: Translate content fluently or target global audiences with native-sounding outputs.

pricing.title: Invest in your <productivity>productivity.</productivity>
pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your creative journey. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.

cta.title: Ready to elevate your workflow?
cta.description: Join thousands of creators and writers who are already building the future with Erza Studio.

article.chatSubtitle: How can I help you today?

listicle.title: Listicle Article
listicle.desc: Listicle Article is a feature that presents articles in the form of numbered or bullet-point lists to make information more concise, structured, and easy to understand.

longform.title: LongForm Article
longform.desc: Longform Article is a feature that presents in-depth, long-form content that explores a topic in a detailed, structured, and narrative.

news.title: News Article
news.desc: News Article is a feature that presents current and factual information in a concise, clear, and timely manner based on recent events.

faq.title: FAQ Article
faq.desc: FAQ Article is a feature that presents information in a structured question-and-answer format, making it easier for users to quickly find answers to common questions.

form.keywordsPlaceholder: Separate with commas (e.g., diet, healthy, exercise)

integration.heading: Integration
integration.description: Connect your CMS platforms to publish directly from Erza AI.
integration.connectDescription: Connect your site to publish articles directly from Erza AI.
integration.step1Desc: Enter the full URL of your WordPress website (without /wp-admin).
integration.appPasswordHint: Erza AI uses WordPress Application Password for secure publishing access.
integration.howToGenerateSteps: Go to your WordPress Dashboard → Users → Profile → scroll down to Application Passwords. Enter a name (e.g. 'Erza AI') and click 'Add New Application Password'. Copy the generated password and paste it here.
integration.importantNoteDesc: Erza AI will only create posts. No other data will be modified.
integration.connectError: Failed to connect. Please check your credentials and try again.
integration.disconnectDescription: Are you sure you want to disconnect {name}? You will no longer be able to publish to this site.
integration.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://yourdomain.com)

integration.bloggerStep1: Sign in with your Google account.
integration.bloggerStep2: Allow Erza AI access to your Blogger.
integration.bloggerStep3: Select the blog you want to connect.
integration.bloggerSelectDesc: Choose which blog you want to connect with Erza AI.
integration.detailForbiddenDesc: You don't have permission to view details for this site.
